source: Past performance is not a guarantee of future results.
target: El rendimiento pasado no es garantía de resultados futuros y no debe considerarse indicativo.
note: Fuzzy variation of approved boilerplate: the wording drifts from the locked TM (extra clause added), so PREPARE routes it as a FUZZY match. Disclaimer validator fails (major, blocking) and routes to Compliance — never auto-approve.

source: Capital at risk. This communication is for institutional investors only and is not investment advice.

source: This material is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice.
target: Este material es solo para informational purposes y no constituye asesoramiento de investment.
